# Wassem Bakes

> Tips, recipes, and techniques from a professional baker with 20+ years of experience running the largest vegan and gluten-free bakery in New York City. Real ratios, real science, no fluff.

## Pages

- [Home](https://wassembakes.com/): Featured posts, recent recipes, and an introduction to Wassem
- [About](https://wassembakes.com/about/): About Wassem Moarsi and the bakery
- [Blog](https://wassembakes.com/blog/): All recipes, baking tips, and guides
- [Links](https://wassembakes.com/links/): Social media, contact, and external links

## Blog Posts

- [The Complete Guide to Salt in Baking](https://wassembakes.com/blog/the-complete-guide-to-salt-in-baking.html): Salt does five jobs in baking, and none of them is making things taste salty. The science, the exact percentages by category, and why fine sea salt is the only one I use.
- [Sugar-Free Protein Brownies](https://wassembakes.com/blog/sugar-free-protein-brownies.html): A straight-from-the-bakery brownie that's sugar-free, vegan, and gluten-free — and still unbelievably fudgy.
- [Five Mistakes Sabotaging Your Gluten-Free Baking](https://wassembakes.com/blog/five-mistakes-sabotaging-your-gluten-free-baking.html): After 20 years in commercial baking, I've seen the same mistakes kill gluten-free bakes again and again — and it's almost never a lack of baking knowledge.
- [DIY Yogurt Substitute for Baking (When You're in a Pinch)](https://wassembakes.com/blog/diy-yogurt-substitute.html): When a recipe calls for yogurt and you're baking it, you don't need yogurt. You need what yogurt does. Here's the four-ingredient bakery hack.
- [4 Ingredient Whippable Plant-Based Heavy Cream](https://wassembakes.com/blog/whippable-vegan-heavy-cream.html): Most plant-based heavy cream recipes online are wrong. Here's the 4-ingredient formula that actually whips, holds in sauces, and doesn't break.
- [The Best Gluten-Free Sourdough Bread](https://wassembakes.com/blog/the-best-gluten-free-sourdough-bread.html): Gluten-free bread isn't as difficult as you think — you just can't treat it like wheat bread. Tried and true recipe from a professional gluten-free bakery kitchen.
- [Sprouting Seeds And Why It Matters](https://wassembakes.com/blog/sprouting-seeds-and-why-it-matters.html): Raw seeds lock up their minerals. Sprouting unlocks them. Here's how to sprout pumpkin, sunflower, quinoa, and more at home, plus the exceptions worth knowing.
- [Vanilla Extract vs Paste vs Powder](https://wassembakes.com/blog/vanilla-extract-vs-paste-vs-powder.html): Three forms of vanilla, three different jobs. Knowing what each one does — and using them on purpose — will make your baked goods better.
- [Make Coconut Yogurt at Home](https://wassembakes.com/blog/make-coconut-yogurt-at-home.html): Coconut yogurt is one of those things that sounds complicated until you realize it's just two ingredients and a little patience.
- [Stop Throwing Your Toppings In. There's a Better Way.](https://wassembakes.com/blog/stop-throwing-your-toppings-in.html): If your blueberries pool at the bottom and your chocolate chips streak the batter, you're mixing them in wrong. Four fixes from a commercial bakery kitchen.
- [The Perfect Cold Brew](https://wassembakes.com/blog/the-perfect-cold-brew.html): Cold brew has a reputation for being difficult. It isn't. The process is mostly waiting — but a few small decisions early on make the difference between smooth and bitter.
- [How to Use Psyllium Husk](https://wassembakes.com/blog/how-to-use-psyllium-husk.html): Psyllium husk is the secret ingredient behind I-can't-believe-it's-gluten-free baking.
- [Vegan Egg Wash Replacements](https://wassembakes.com/blog/vegan-egg-wash-replacements.html): We tested every option. Every. Single. One.
- [What is Nutritional Yeast?](https://wassembakes.com/blog/what-is-nutritional-yeast.html): Cheesy, funky, and gaining popularity as interest grows in vegan cooking.
- [Lemon Zucchini Protein Muffins](https://wassembakes.com/blog/lemon-zucchini-protein-muffins.html): These muffins pack in a whole lot of nutritional value with low sugar to boot.
- [Protein Packed Rice Krispie Treats](https://wassembakes.com/blog/protein-packed-rice-krispie-treats.html): Take a bite of my healthy take on the classic rice krispy treat - date-sweetened, protein-packed, and built to fuel you.
- [Essential Egg Replacements for Vegan Baking](https://wassembakes.com/blog/essential-egg-replacements-for-vegan-baking.html): Eggs do three jobs in baking - binding, moisture, and leavening. The key to veganizing a recipe is knowing what you're replacing.
- [Baking (and Eating) More Sustainably](https://wassembakes.com/blog/baking-and-eating-more-sustainably.html): Small changes to what you eat and where you buy it add up. Practical tips on cutting food waste, reducing packaging, and eating local and in season.
- [Baking Basics Every Beginner Needs to Know](https://wassembakes.com/blog/baking-basics-every-beginner-needs-to-know.html): Whether you're vegan, gluten-free, or none of the above, these tips are for you.
- [Gut-Healthy Postbiotics With Fermented Beets](https://wassembakes.com/blog/gut-healthy-postbiotics-with-fermented-beets.html): Learn what ferments can do for your gut, plus an easy beet recipe to get started.
- [Starter Guide to Gluten-Free Flours](https://wassembakes.com/blog/starter-guide-to-gluten-free-flours.html): Gluten-free flours aren't one-to-one swaps for wheat. A starter guide to the flours we use most — what each does, when to reach for it, and a sample blend to get you started.
- [Binders For Better Gluten-Free Baking](https://wassembakes.com/blog/binders-for-better-gluten-free-baking.html): If you're baking without gluten, adding binders is essential. We're taking you through what they all do and when and how to use each.
- [Choosing the Right Oils for Healthier Baking](https://wassembakes.com/blog/choosing-the-right-oils-for-healthier-baking.html): A baker's guide to oils — choosing not just for taste but for health, quality, and performance.
- [Naturally Color Treats](https://wassembakes.com/blog/naturally-color-treats.html): Skip the artificial dyes. Beet, butterfly pea, spirulina, turmeric, and matcha — our favorite natural food colors and how to get the most out of them.
- [Scoby Secrets: Making Kombucha at Home](https://wassembakes.com/blog/scoby-secrets-making-kombucha-at-home.html): How to brew tangy, fizzy kombucha at home — what a scoby is, what it does, and the two-stage fermentation that turns sweet tea into a probiotic drink.
- [Pumpkin Pie Muffin](https://wassembakes.com/blog/pumpkin-pie-muffin.html): Pumpkin pie meets banana-based muffin: flax-egg binding, oat-flour base, pumpkin pie spice filling, and a brown sugar crumb top.
